title: Open-Question Record Schema v0

sources.label: Multiple Myeloma Schema And Tooling Phase Inventory v0
Multiple Myeloma Roadmap Public Task Queue v0

limitations: Schema validation does not make an open-question record medical advice.

The schema does not accept clinical priority, evidence-strength ranking, urgency guidance, patient relevance, actionability, treatment recommendations, trial recommendations, expanded-access guidance, candidate options, or real case data.
The schema does not prove a question is important, urgent, resolved, actionable, patient-relevant, expert-reviewed, or higher evidence than another question.
The template is public placeholder data only.
Tooling should wait for a separate readiness gate after this shape validates.
